description_long: This hoverboard features a streamlined, modern design with a predominantly matte orange exterior accented by black and yellow-green details. The device has two large, wheel-like components on either side, each with a star-shaped pattern on the hub, providing both stability and a distinctive visual flair. The footpad areas are black with a textured, grippy surface for secure footing, and are slightly recessed into the main body for added safety. Subtle lighting elements are visible on the front and rear, likely serving as indicators or safety lights, with greenish hues at the front and red at the back. The overall build appears to be a combination of durable plastic and rubber, with internal metal components for structural support. No visible brand logos or control interfaces are present, emphasizing a minimalist and functional aesthetic.
description: A sleek, orange hoverboard with black textured footpads, star-patterned wheels, and subtle front and rear lighting accents. The design is modern and functional, with no visible branding or controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, front wheel with a star pattern, and a greenish lighting strip above the wheel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dual wheel configuration, recessed black footpads, and the overall slim, contoured body shape.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the rear wheel and a red lighting strip above it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same dual wheel setup, footpads, and red rear lighting accents.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Two large, parallel wheels integrated into each side of the board, each with a prominent star-shaped hub design; wheels are nearly as tall as the body and provide primary support and movement.
attribute_footpad_design: Two rectangular, black footpads with a textured, grippy surface; slightly recessed into the orange body for stability; likely contain pressure sensors for control; no visible raised edges but clear separation from the main body.
attribute_lighting_features: Front: thin greenish LED strip above the front wheel; Rear: thin red LED strip above the rear wheel; likely serve as safety indicators or direction signals.
